name: Rum Toddy
title: Hot Rum Toddy Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Rum Toddy | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A warm rum toddy made with BACARDÍ Carta Oro, hot water, honey, and lemon.
marketing_description: From crisp nights to après ski, this Hot Rum Toddy warms you up with its Caribbean heat. A comforting cocktail, it's perfect for cosying up with close friends.

steps: Pour hot water into a tempered glass mug.
Squeeze the lemon wedge into the water, add honey, and stir until the honey is dissolved.
Add BACARDÍ Carta Oro gold rum, and stir gently.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick and a lemon slice.

garnish: cinnamon stick and a lemon slice
raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Rum Toddy 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum 100 ml hot water 12.5 ml honey 1 lemon wedge(s) ... Garnish with a cinnamon stick and a lemon slice.
